news.title: Dollar Falls on U.S.-Iran Deal Optimism
news.description: The dollar was falling after President Donald Trump pulled back from threats for more military strikes against Iran and said the two sides were nearing a deal. Trump said Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei had signed off on the plan, which could be completed in coming days.
